evals.prompt: 下载这个抖音视频: https://v.douyin.com/iRNRCeu/
evals.expected: Calls DouyinAdapter, attempts TikHub API first, returns DownloadResult with video_path, metadata (title/author/likes), platform='douyin', method='tikhub'.
Calls YouTubeAdapter, uses yt-dlp, returns DownloadResult with video_path, platform='youtube', method='yt-dlp'.
detect_platform() raises UnknownPlatformError. Agent reports the platform is not supported and lists supported platforms.
Calls XiaohongshuAdapter, attempts TikHub API first, returns DownloadResult with platform='xiaohongshu'. If TikHub fails, falls back to Playwright.
